762 GG0170D5_STND_INTRIM_CD GG0170D5_STND_INTRIM_CD GG0170D5 Mobility: Sitting to Standing Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Sit to stand: The ability to come to a standing position from sitting in a chair, wheelchair, or on the side of the bed. effective 10/01/2019
